since_last: 35% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.57%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC -1.42% · Gold -0.76% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 35% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.57%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.57%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -4.42%
cards.body: Leaders: DV +1.88%, TTD +1.79%, LSCC +1.68%, WDAY +1.12%, NOW +1.09%. Laggards: MU -4.42%, AMAT -4.11%, TER -4.00%, LRCX -3.61%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.80% at $144.14
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
